description: Data loaded from CSV file: 243.csv (Dataset: Global Metropolis Weather Dataset)

fields.name: Location
fields.sample_values: Dubai, Hong Kong, London, New York, Paris, Rome, Sydney, Tokyo
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field identifies the major global cities where weather data observations were recorded, representing each city's name as a string value.

fields.name: Observation Time
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the specific date and time when weather observations were made in various global metropolitan locations, serving as a timestamp for each weather data entry.

fields.name: Temperature (°C)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the observed air temperature in degrees Celsius for major cities, likely during specific timeframes or events, indicating mild to warm weather conditions.

fields.name: Feels Like (°C)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the perceived outdoor temperature in degrees Celsius, reflecting weather conditions as experienced by people in various cities, accounting for factors like humidity and wind, rather than the actual air temperature.

fields.name: Humidity (%)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the relative humidity levels (as percentages) recorded in various global metropolitan areas, indicating the amount of moisture present in the air at the time of measurement.

fields.name: Wind Speed (kph)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the measured wind speed in kilometers per hour at major cities, indicating typical weather conditions ranging from light to moderate winds.

fields.name: Weather Condition
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field captures the qualitative description of prevailing weather states (e.g., clear, rain, cloudy) observed at global metropolitan locations.

fields.name: Cloud Cover (%)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field quantifies the percentage of the sky obscured by clouds over a metropolis, indicating cloudiness levels for weather monitoring purposes, with discrete values such as clear (0%), partly cloudy (50%), and mostly cloudy (75%).

fields.name: Pressure (mb)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records atmospheric pressure in millibars measured at various global metropolitan locations, likely representing daily or periodic weather observations for urban climate analysis.

fields.name: UV Index
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: The "UV Index" field represents a categorical measure of ultraviolet radiation exposure levels in different cities, indicating the risk of harm from sun exposure in the context of global weather monitoring.

fields.name: Visibility (km)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: The "Visibility (km)" field indicates the measured distance, in kilometers, that one can see clearly in various global metropolitan areas, reflecting atmospheric clarity and weather conditions.

formatted_summary:
## Table 1: Global_Metropolis_Weather_Dataset (800 rows × 11 columns)

### Description
Data loaded from CSV file: 243.csv (Dataset: Global Metropolis Weather Dataset)

### Schema (11 fields)
  - Location -- type: object, values: Dubai, Hong Kong, London, New York, Paris, Rome, Sydney, Tokyo
  - Observation Time -- type: object, values: 4/5/2024 14:15, 4/5/2024 19:30, 4/5/2024 20:30, 4/5/2024 22:30, 4/6/2024 2:30, 4/6/2024 3:30, 4/6/2024 5:30
  - Temperature (°C) -- type: float64, values: 8.3, 10.0, 15.0, 16.0, 19.0, 24.0, 25.0
  - Feels Like (°C) -- type: float64, values: 4.5, 8.1, 13.8, 15.8, 16.0, 19.0, 25.5, 27.8
  - Humidity (%) -- type: int64, values: 40, 65, 67, 72, 76, 79, 88, 100
  - Wind Speed (kph) -- type: float64, values: 3.6, 6.1, 6.8, 9.0, 20.2, 24.1, 29.9
  - Weather Condition -- type: object, values: Clear, Light rain, Partly cloudy
  - Cloud Cover (%) -- type: int64, values: 0, 50, 75
  - Pressure (mb) -- type: int64, values: 1003, 1006, 1012, 1013, 1014, 1021, 1024
  - UV Index -- type: int64, values: 1, 2, 3, 4
  - Visibility (km) -- type: int64, values: 10, 16

### Sample Data (first 5 rows)
```

1  New York   4/5/2024 14:15               8.3              4.5            40              29.9     Partly cloudy               75           1003         2               16
2  New York   4/5/2024 14:15               8.3              4.5            40              29.9     Partly cloudy               75           1003         2               16
3  New York   4/5/2024 14:15               8.3              4.5            40              29.9     Partly cloudy               75           1003         2               16
4  New York   4/5/2024 14:15               8.3              4.5            40              29.9     Partly cloudy               75           1003         2               16
```
